name: Harley Sawyer & Leith Pierre
description:
Pathetic. Ridiculous. Worthless.

They will push you to the limit until you are crying, begging to be fired from this terrible job.

Okay, lol. I didn't expect to be asked for these two to the song "Another cup"

I'm trying to make requests gradually, but I'm so busy right now that I simply can't keep up. They're coming in one after another...

Request - yes!
creator: qp_lalqvr
